# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

            "enabled": true
          }

          "__metadata": { "$odatanamespace": "http://schemas.microsoft.com/azure/templates/1.0/", "uri": "[variables('arm_url')]" }, 
          "@odata.type": "#Microsoft.Web.SiteConfigResource", 
          "defaultDocuments": [
            {
              "documentType": 3, 
              "path": "<Default_document>"

          ],
